name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry Jacksonville, Florida — Value Pawn & Jewelry is a Miami pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, gold/jewelry buying, retail merc...
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, Florida. The business functions within the EZPAWN family of stores and serves the local Miami community by providing quick cash solutions through pawn transactions and merchandise sales. The store has been established as a neighborhood pawn shop focused on serving customers who need immediate liquidity or affordable pre-owned goods.

The company offers a diverse range of services centered on collateral-based lending and retail sales. Core offerings include pawn loans (borrowing against personal items), gold and diamond jewelry buying, firearms sales, auto loans, and retail merchandise featuring discounted pre-owned electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming items, and fashion goods. Value Pawn & Jewelry provides flexible payment options including layaway (10% down with monthly payments), third-party financing for up to 12 months, and an online shopping platform. They also offer protection plans for jewelry and products, an EZ+ Rewards Program for frequent customers, and an Instant Quote tool for electronics valuations.

The store distinguishes itself through several specific features: extended operating hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 9am-6pm Saturday, 12pm-5pm Sunday), expert gold and diamond testing for accurate pricing, a daily-updated inventory of new merchandise, partnerships with third-party financing companies for flexible payment terms, and the EZ+ Rewards Program that awards points on pawns, redemptions, sales, and purchases. The company emphasizes customer service and community integration in its messaging, stating commitment to treating customers "with service and respect."

Value Pawn & Jewelry is a legitimate pawn shop appropriate for consumers needing quick cash against collateral or seeking heavily discounted pre-owned brand-name merchandise. However, pawn loans carry inherent risks: items not redeemed within the loan term may be forfeited and resold, fees and interest apply to all transactions, and the amount lent is typically 40-60% of resale value. This is a short-term liquidity solution, not a sustainable credit-building tool, and customers must understand they are trading possession of valuable items for immediate cash.
pros: Extended store hours (9am-7pm weekdays) provide accessibility for working customers
Expert precious metals testing ensures accurate, fair pricing on gold and diamond jewelry
Daily inventory updates with 25-70% discounts on pre-owned brand-name electronics, tools, and jewelry
Multiple payment options including layaway (10% down), third-party financing up to 12 months, and direct purchase
EZ+ Rewards Program provides points on eligible transactions that can be managed online
Online Instant Quote tool allows customers to get estimated values for electronics before visiting
In-store services for gold buying, pawn loans, and firearms/auto loans available in one location
Online shopping platform enables remote browsing and purchasing without store visits
cons: Pawn loans require forfeiture of personal items if not redeemed within the loan term—items become inventory and are resold
Loan amounts are typically only 40-60% of item resale value, not full value replacement
All transactions subject to undisclosed fees and interest rates (specifics not listed on website)
Some services (online payments) explicitly unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania
Pre-owned merchandise carries no manufacturer warranty or endorsement; all items sold as-is
best_for: Consumers with urgent short-term cash needs and valuable collateral they can temporarily surrender
Bargain shoppers seeking heavily discounted pre-owned electronics, jewelry, and brand-name merchandise
Individuals looking to sell gold, diamonds, or jewelry for immediate cash at competitive rates
Customers needing flexible layaway or third-party financing options for merchandise purchases
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for Miami-area consumers with immediate short-term cash needs who own valuable items they can pledge as collateral, or bargain hunters seeking steeply discounted pre-owned merchandise. The critical caveat is that pawn loans are inherently risky: failure to repay within the term results in permanent loss of the pledged item, and loan amounts are typically only 40-60% of resale value—this should only be used as a last-resort emergency funding source, not a regular financial strategy.
services: Pawn loans against personal collateral with quick cash disbursement
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with expert precious metals testing
Retail merchandise sales (electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming, fashion) at 25-70% discounts
Layaway purchases with 10% down and monthly payment options
Third-party financing for purchases up to 12 months (credit-dependent)
Jewelry VIP Protection Plan with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise
EZ+ Rewards Program with online account management and points accrual
Online Instant Quote tool for electronics valuations
Online shopping platform with daily inventory updates
